lines.english: God exists in the beginning, in the middle and in the end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਭਉ ਮਿਟਿਆ ਸਾਧਸੰਗ ਤੇ ਦਾਲਿਦ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਘਾਲਕਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: bhram bhau mittiaa saadhasang te daalid na koee ghaalakaa |6|
lines.english: Doubt and fear are erased, in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, and then one is not afflicted by deadly pain. ||6||
Whatever the Creator Lord Himself does, comes to pass.
I beg for the dust of the feet of the Saadh Sangat.
I sing the most Sublime Bani, the Word of the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਸਨ ਮੇਟਿ ਨਿਬਾਸਨ ਹੋਈਐ ਕਲਮਲ ਸਗਲੇ ਜਾਲਕਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: baasan mett nibaasan hoeeai kalamal sagale jaalakaa |7|
lines.english: Eradicating desire, I have become free of desire; I have burnt away all my sins. ||7||
This is the unique way of the Saints;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਆਰਾਧਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਿਉ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਕੀਜੈ ਆਲਕਾ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: saas saas aaraadhan har har kiau simarat keejai aalakaa |8|
lines.english: With each and every breath, they worship and adore the Lord, Har, Har. How could anyone be too lazy to meditate on Him? ||8||
they behold the Supreme Lord God with them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਜੀਵਹਿ ਤੇਰੇ ਦਾਸਾ ਬਨਿ ਜਲਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਥਾਲਕਾ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: simar simar jeeveh tere daasaa ban jal pooran thaalakaa |9|
lines.english: Your slaves live by meditating, meditating in remembrance on the Lord; You are permeating the woods, the water and the land. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਮਖ ਨ ਵਿਸਰਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮੇਰੇ ਸੁਆਮੀ ॥
lines.translit: nimakh na visarahu prabh mere suaamee |
lines.english: I never forget God, my Lord and Master, even for an instant.
Wherever I look, there I see the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਤੀ ਵਾਉ ਨ ਤਾ ਕਉ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: tatee vaau na taa kau laagai |
lines.english: Even the hot wind does not touch one
who remains awake in meditative remembrance, night and day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦ ਬਿਨੋਦ ਕਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਨੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਤਾਲਕਾ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: anad binod kare har simaran tis maaeaa sang na taalakaa |10|
lines.english: He delights and enjoys meditative remembrance on the Lord; he has no attachment to Maya. ||10||
Disease, sorrow and pain do not affect him;
Your Name is a jewel, O my Beloved Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੇਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਸੁਣਿ ਬੇਨੰਤੀ ਖਾਲਕਾ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: aapanaa naam dehi prabh preetam sun benantee khaalakaa |11|
lines.english: Please bless me with Your Name, O my Beloved Lord God; please listen to my prayer, O Creator. ||11||
he sings the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.
Your slaves are imbued with Your Infinite Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਤੇ ਤੁਧੁ ਜੇਹੇ ਵਿਰਲੇ ਕੇਈ ਭਾਲਕਾ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: terai rang rate tudh jehe virale keee bhaalakaa |12|
lines.english: Those who are imbued with Your Love, become like You; it is so rare that they are found. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਈ ਸਦਾ ਸੰਗੀ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਲਕਾ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: tin kai sang param pad paaee sadaa sangee har naalakaa |13|
lines.english: Associating with them, I obtain the supreme status; the Lord, my Companion, is always with me. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਧੂੜਿ ਮਾਂਗੈ ਮਨੁ ਮੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: tin kee dhoorr maangai man meraa |
lines.english: My mind longs for the dust of the feet of those
who never forget the Lord.
who implants the Name of the One Lord within, and eradicates evil-mindedness.
He alone is my beloved friend and companion,

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ਤਜਾਏ ਤਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਨਿਰਮਾਲਕਾ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh ahankaar tajaae tis jan kau upades niramaalakaa |14|
lines.english: Immaculate are the teachings of that humble servant of the Lord, who casts out sexual desire, anger and egotism. ||14||
Other than You, O Lord, no one is mine.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਜਿਨਿ ਖੰਡਿਆ ਭਰਮੁ ਅਨਾਲਕਾ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: hau balihaaree satigur poore jin khanddiaa bharam anaalakaa |15|
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to the Perfect True Guru, who has destroyed the illusion of duality. ||15||
The Guru has led me to grasp the feet of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਉ ਧਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar har har kau dhiaaee |
lines.english: Twenty-four hours a day, I meditate on the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੰਤ ਤੇਰੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਤੂ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਵਡਾਲਕਾ ॥੧੬॥੪॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: naanak sant terai rang raate too samarath vaddaalakaa |16|4|13|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Saints are imbued with Your Love; You are the great and all-powerful Lord. ||16||4||13||
With each and every breath, I never forget God.
Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਅਰਪਿ ਧਰੀ ਸਭੁ ਆਗੈ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੁਹਾਵਣਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tan man arap dharee sabh aagai jag meh naam suhaavanaa |1|
lines.english: I dedicate my body, mind and everything, and place it in offering before the Lord. His Name is the most beautiful in this world. ||1||
I enshrine the Lord's lotus feet continually within my heart.
Each and every moment, I humbly bow to the Perfect Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਿ ਗਰਾਸਿ ਸਮਾਲੇ ਕਰਤਾ ਕੀਤਾ ਅਪਣਾ ਪਾਵਣਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: saas garaas samaale karataa keetaa apanaa paavanaa |2|
lines.english: With every breath and morsel of food, the Creator takes care of His beings, who receive according to what they have done. ||2||
Why forget the Lord and Master from your mind?
He blessed you with body and soul, creating and embellishing you.
No one returns empty-handed from Him;

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਹਰਿ ਰਖੁ ਮਨ ਮਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar har rakh man maahee |
lines.english: twenty-four hours a day, keep the Lord in your mind.
